name: Calibre
description: Calibre — Web performance monitoring platform tracking Core Web Vitals, Lighthouse, and budget regressions.

seo.title: Calibre — CDN / Edge / Acceleration
seo.meta_description: Calibre: Calibre — Web performance monitoring platform tracking Core Web Vitals, Lighthouse, and budget regressions.

when_to_use: Tracking Core Web Vitals regressions over time in CI
Performance budget monitoring for frontend engineering teams
Lighthouse score trending across deployments and releases
Alerting on page weight and LCP degradation after deploys
Web performance benchmarking against competitor sites

pros: Real user monitoring plus synthetic tests
Clean UI and solid Core Web Vitals tracking
cons: Pricing per site adds up for large portfolios
Fewer features than SpeedCurve at the high end
review.verdict: Polished performance monitoring for marketing sites and small teams, less rich than SpeedCurve for deep perf work.
review.best_for: Marketing sites and small product teams tracking Core Web Vitals trends
review.not_for: Large multi-site orgs needing custom metrics and deep waterfall analysis

developer_experience.reason: CLI, API, CI integrations, strong docs
